title: Infosys completes ₹18,000 crore equity share buyback
detailed_summary: Infosys completed its 2025 equity share buyback through the tender offer route. The company bought back 10,00,00,000 fully paid-up Equity Shares at ₹1,800/- per Equity Share for an aggregate consideration of up to ₹18,000 crore, excluding transaction costs. The buyback represented 24.31% and 21.68% of the aggregate fully paid-up equity share capital and free reserves on a standalone and consolidated basis, respectively, based on audited interim condensed financial statements as at June 30, 2025. The tendering period ran from November 20, 2025 to November 26, 2025, settlement was completed on December 3, 2025, and the bought-back shares were extinguished on December 4, 2025. Post-buyback paid-up share capital reduced from 4,15,44,01,349 Equity Shares to 4,05,46,24,409 Equity Shares.

key_facts.fact: Infosys bought back 10,00,00,000 fully paid-up Equity Shares at ₹1,800/- per Equity Share.
The total amount utilized in the Buyback was18,000 crore (Rupees EighteenThousand Crore only),excluding Transaction Costs.
The Buyback represented 24.31% and 21.68% of the aggregate of fully paid-up equity share capital and free reserves on a standalone basis and consolidated basis, respectively.
The Tendering Period for the Buyback commenced on Thursday, November 20,2025 and closed on Wednesday, November 26,2025.
The settlement of all valid bids which were Accepted was completed on December3,2025.
The extinguishment of 10,00,00,000 Equity Shares Accepted under the Buyback was completed on December 4, 2025.
Issued, subscribed and paid-up share capital declined from 4,15,44,01,349 Equity Shares to 4,05,46,24,409 Equity Shares after completion of the Buyback.
